bibliographic_info.title: Precise real-time navigation of the LEO satellite enhanced by BDS-3 PPP-B2b service

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  Available online at www.sciencedirect.com ScienceDirect Advances in Space Research 75(2025)7003–7019 www.elsevier.com/locate/asr Precise real-time navigation of the LEO satellite enhanced by BDS-3 PPP-B2b service Xuewen Gonga,b,c,⁎ , Wanwei Zhangc , Aili Zhaoa,b,e , Shuaihe Gaoa,b, Fuhong Wangc , Jingkui Zhangd, Song Xied, Guodong Fenga,b , Zaichun Yanga,b,e a National Time Servi

In this paper, the correction data released by the BDS-3 PPP-B2b service are introduced to correct the broadcast ephemeris of GPS and BDS-3 satellites, aiming to enhance the real-time orbit accuracy of LEO satellites.
